{{Infobox group
| name = Shi family
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Shi family]] provided housing in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The houses of the [[Shi family]] are smaller than the three-story house [[Lindon]] is staying in.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Shi family]]'s housing districts were torn apart by rolling earth.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
